[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card with a [Trigger] from your hand: Draw 1 card and give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en:
If your {Egghead} type Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up instead.
[Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.
trigger_en: [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en: [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.
trigger_en: [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en:
[On K.O.] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Add up to 1 card from your hand to the top of your Life cards.
[Trigger] Up to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards gains +2000 power during this turn.
trigger_en: [Trigger] Up to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards gains +2000 power during this turn.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en:
[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards.
[Trigger] Play this card.
trigger_en: [Trigger] Play this card.
type_family: Straw Hat Crew The Four Emperors Egghead
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en: [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the total of your and your opponent's Life cards.
trigger_en: [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the total of your and your opponent's Life cards.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】
スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en: [On Play] / [When Attacking] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】
スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en:
If the number of your Life cards is equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards, this Character gains +1000 power.
[Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.
trigger_en: [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 1 or less Life cards, give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards -2000 power during this turn.
trigger_en: [Trigger] Draw 1 card.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en:
[Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.
[Trigger] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
trigger_en: [Trigger] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
set_name_jp: スタートデッキ EGGHEAD【ST-29】

effect_en: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {East Blue} type card other than [The Outcome Will Tell Us Who's Strong and Who's Weak] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
trigger_en: [Trigger] Draw 1 card.
